title: Shulkermeleon
description: Shulkermeleon adds 17 colors to Shulkers, matching Shulker Boxes. The default Shulker Box changes color when placed, and dyed ones retain their color. Requires Optifine or a compatible alternative.
body:
**Shulkermeleon – All 17 Colors for Shulkers!**

Ever wished Shulkers could match their boxes? Now they do! This resource pack updates the Shulker mob to have all 17 possible colors, just like Shulker Boxes. Instead of always being purple, Shulkers will now spawn in different colors, making them more visually diverse and matching their dropped boxes.

**Features:**
- Adds all 17 colors to the Shulker mob, matching the dyeable Shulker Boxes.
- Shulkers will now spawn in different colors instead of just purple.
- The default Shulker Box changes color when placed.
- Dyed Shulker Boxes retain their color when broken and placed again.
  
**Requirements:**
- Optifine or a compatible alternative (Iris + Sodium)
  
**How It Affects Gameplay:**

This pack makes the End feel more colorful and immersive, giving players more variety when encountering Shulkers. It doesn’t change mechanics—only the appearance of the mobs and boxes—so it’s perfect for those who want a visual upgrade without altering vanilla gameplay.

Enjoy!
